entry.title: v1.129.0
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • Bump version to v1.129.0 by @mozzius in #11175
  • Add moduleSuffixes to tsconfig by @mozzius in #11146
  • Cache main bundle stats for PR checks by @mozzius in #11172
  • Reduce bottom hitslop for menu button by @ds-boyce in #11189
  • Split mobile build/submit pipelines and de-duplicate OTA workflow by @mozzius in #11133
  • Fix Android release asset upload by @mozzius in #11174
  • Add nightly Maestro E2E workflow by @mozzius in #11181
  • Lighten blue (link) text for dim and dark themes by @ds-boyce in #11164
  • Stop closing search suggestions on input blur by @mozzius in #11199
  • Add height constraint to full-height bottom sheets by @ds-boyce in #11178
  • Fix image crop in quote posts, remove PostEmbedViewContext.FeedEmbedRecordWithMedia by @estrattonbailey in #11205
  • Don't roll up account labels into additional post alerts by @estrattonbailey in #11204
  • Fix image menu in landscape orientation by @vineyardbovines in #11188
  • Bump actions/setup-node from 6.4.0 to 7.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in #11203
  • Bump the actions group with 4 updates by @dependabot[bot] in #11202
  • Restore activity notification subscriptions screen by @ds-boyce in #11201
  • TypeScript 7 (attempt 2) by @mozzius in #11169
  • add client event for failed video playback by @vineyardbovines in #11170
  • Add new search results tab for starter packs by @ds-boyce in #11226
  • Remove console.log, address lint by @ds-boyce in #11228
  • Squish separate imports from the same source in ActivityNotificationSettings by @RetroSunstar in #11225
  • Move known likers below stats row; restore original order in stats row by @abenzer in #11192
  • Hide video pillarboxing on web when the card fits by @vineyardbovines in #11118
  • Use stable tsgolint by @mozzius in #11229
  • Pass recId with trending topic click metrics by @ds-boyce in #11232
  • Add feature gate for starter pack search by @ds-boyce in #11234
  • Update presentation of trending topics in Explore by @ds-boyce in #11227
  • Create new trending feeds interstitial by @ds-boyce in #11207
  • Update presentation of trending feeds by @ds-boyce in #11206
  • Tweak loading state for block dialog by @ds-boyce in #11236
  • Add From: Me to advanced search filters by @ds-boyce in #11126
  • Display beta badge when isBetaUser is true by @ds-boyce in #11160
  • Enable sharing a post to a new group chat by @ds-boyce in #11191
  • React Native New Arch by @abulenok in #10980
  • Sort follows and following behind gate by @ds-boyce in #11237
  • Stub RN codegen native component on web by @vineyardbovines in #11240
  • Display post counts greater than 1,000 by @ds-boyce in #11242
  • Fix scroll forwarder web entrypoint by @mozzius in #11245
  • Update API package and filter AA configs by platform by @estrattonbailey in #11244
  • Migrate useScrollViewOffset to useScrollOffset by @tomekzaw in #11250
  • Tweak appearance of trending topics by @ds-boyce in #11253
  • Fix Maestro E2E runtime environment by @mozzius in #11247
  • Fix Maestro E2E regressions on iOS and Android by @mozzius in #11258
  • Bump github.com/hashicorp/go-retryablehttp from 0.7.5 to 0.7.7 in /bskyweb by @dependabot[bot] in #11257
  • Add intl note on OTA flow by @estrattonbailey in #11241
  • Add hitslop to switch account ... menu by @mozzius in #11262
  • Fix native signup captcha interactions by @vineyardbovines in #11263
  • Update react-native-uitextview by @mozzius in #11264
  • v1.129.0 release prep by @mozzius in #11265

New Contributors

  • @abulenok made their first contribution in #10980
  • @tomekzaw made their first contribution in #11250

Full Changelog: 1.128.0...1.129.0

entry.title: v1.129.0 RC 1 (New Arch)
entry.content:
Experimental New Arch Build

This build contains experimental changes to enable the React Native New Architecture. Thank you for helping us test it out! If you find any bugs, please file a GitHub Issue using the "Bug Report - Fabric/New Architecture" template.

Full Changelog: 1.128.0-rc1...1.129.0-rc1

entry.title: v1.128.0
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • Remove unused video extension extraction in Share extension by @mozzius in #11081
  • Update lint-staged by @mozzius in #11084
  • Fix KWS language picker silently resetting Arabic, Chinese, Filipino & Portuguese to English by @surfdude29 in #11082
  • Update KWS supported languages and mapping by @surfdude29 in #11085
  • Replace @tiptap/html generateJSON with native DOMParser equivalent by @mozzius in #11098
  • Slim down CLAUDE.md by @mozzius in #11102
  • Migrate all search to v2 and remove v1 by @ds-boyce in #11125
  • restore v1.128.0 by @mozzius in #11131
  • Fix crash when maxHeight is nil at sheet presentation by @mozzius in #11104
  • Potentially fix disappearing chat emoji on some devices by @ds-boyce in #11113
  • Lazy load @ipld/dag-cbor in computeCid by @mozzius in #11099
  • pnpm 11.11.0 by @mozzius in #11130
  • Migrate to Oxlint by @mozzius in #10384
  • Collapse label appeal flow into ModerationDetailsDialog by @amckinley in #11091
  • Ensure long trending topic titles can wrap by @ds-boyce in #11141
  • Prototype: Show known likers on post thread page by @abenzer in #11080
  • Bump the actions group with 6 updates by @dependabot[bot] in #11148
  • Update Sentry to 8.x by @mozzius in #11147
  • Typescript 7 by @mozzius in #11109
  • Create primary tooltip variant by @ds-boyce in #11140
  • Allow up to 10 images in share intent by @mozzius in #11132
  • Add video playback observability to Sentry by @vineyardbovines in #11111
  • Revert "Typescript 7" by @mozzius in #11152
  • Stub out react-native-svg fetchData on web to drop buffer polyfill by @mozzius in #11097
  • fix web feed footer clearing the bottom bar by @vineyardbovines in #11151
  • [APP-2642] Social proof text is truncated on mobile by @estrattonbailey in #11155
  • fix android carousel jiggle from cdn-rounded aspect ratio by @vineyardbovines in #11153
  • Add setting for opting in to beta features by @ds-boyce in #11123
  • Strip leading @ in from: queries by @ds-boyce in #11158
  • Upgrade pnpm to 11.13.0 by @ds-boyce in #11163
  • Remove IS_INTERNAL check for beta feedback button by @ds-boyce in #11162
  • Don't suggest retrying an unretryable error by @ds-boyce in #11159
  • Log additional context for post:* events by @ds-boyce in #11035
  • Add DM button to labeller profiles by @RetroSunstar in #11149
  • Fix invisible bidi characters copied with handles on web by @a-y-ibrahim in #11066
  • Add mark requests as read to chat settings menu by @ds-boyce in #11107
  • Update SVGO by @mozzius in #11083
  • Add Japan-gated custom logo by @mozzius in #11161
  • v1.128.0 release prep by @mozzius in #11167
  • use pnpm 11.13.1 by @mozzius in #11168

New Contributors

  • @a-y-ibrahim made their first contribution in #11066

Full Changelog: 1.127.1...1.128.0

entry.title: v1.128.0 RC 1 (New Arch)
entry.content:
Experimental New Arch Build

This build contains experimental changes to enable the React Native New Architecture. Thank you for helping us test it out! If you find any bugs, please file a GitHub Issue using the "Bug Report - Fabric/New Architecture" template.

entry.title: v1.127.1
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • Lazy-load mediabunny on web by @mozzius in #11094
  • Fix Android crash in chat keyboard scroll (part 2) by @mozzius in #11096
  • Bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.51.0 to 0.52.0 in /bskyweb by @dependabot[bot] in #11100
  • Add more search placeholders by @ds-boyce in #11089
  • Revert "Add more search placeholders (#11089)" by @ds-boyce in #11101
  • Bump version to v1.128.0 by @mozzius in #11105
  • Adjust AA device signals copy by @estrattonbailey in #11106
  • Update advanced search UI by @ds-boyce in #11088
  • use source file for web video compression by @vineyardbovines in #11090
  • Update mergeRefs util for React 19 by @ds-boyce in #11108
  • Revert "Remove react-native-dotenv (#10706)" by @mozzius in #11110
  • Fix search typeahead performance with absolute overlay by @mozzius in #11103
  • v1.127.1 Release prep by @mozzius in #11116

Full Changelog: 1.127.0...1.127.1

entry.title: v1.127.0
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • Use correct param name for setup-bundletool action by @ds-boyce in #11020
  • WSOD when trying to create account from starter pack on non-default provider by @c960657 in #10970
  • Replace react-native-compressor video path with native expo-bluesky-video-compress module [APP-2428] by @vineyardbovines in #10954
  • Always scroll to bottom of chat after sending a message by @ds-boyce in #10913
  • Cull unused files by @mozzius in #11029
  • Remove react-native-dotenv by @mozzius in #10706
  • Update search input with useAutocomplete by @ds-boyce in #11023
  • Always set allTime to true for search v2 by @ds-boyce in #11033
  • Avoid leaking previous messages via replies by @ds-boyce in #11017
  • Use latest fingerprint-native action by @ds-boyce in #11016
  • Bump the actions group with 3 updates by @dependabot[bot] in #11021
  • Bump actions/checkout from 6.0.3 to 7.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in #11022
  • Route iOS notification settings intent into the app by @mozzius in #11003
  • Rename root file from js to ts, improve platform splitting by @mozzius in #11012
  • Remove actions-up script in favor of Dependabot by @estrattonbailey in #11034
  • Fix UI overlap issue where text was rendering over icons by @ashish-khankari in #10774
  • Add "fingerprint changed" label to PRs with native changes by @mozzius in #10742
  • adding focus to the editing block by @Zaven477 in #10593
  • Only request notification permission once per session by @mozzius in #11004
  • Fix hashtag author filter failing for DIDs by @surfdude29 in #10772
  • Fix lint by @estrattonbailey in #11038
  • Added Automation label to labeller display names by @RetroSunstar in #11027
  • Restore link in Go Live prompt if status record present by @LooneyH in #10636
  • Fix stale display names for lists/feeds in top bar across restarts/devices by @RetroSunstar in #10651
  • Fix yaml syntax in pull-request-commit.yml by @ds-boyce in #11037
  • Use RNKC for composer keyboard avoiding view by @mozzius in #10997
  • Update advanced search suggestions by @ds-boyce in #11036
  • Reduce Sentry noise from logger transport and expected-failure call sites by @vineyardbovines in #10893
  • Bump app version to 1.127.0 by @estrattonbailey in #11040
  • Fix blank message list after submit on Android by @ds-boyce in #11042
  • Special-case 'me' values in search queries by @ds-boyce in #11043
  • [AAv2] Integrate on-device APIs by @estrattonbailey in #9564
  • Remove potentially intent violating chat settings restriction by @estrattonbailey in #11056
  • Fix back button behavior on login/create account screen by @ds-boyce in #11052
  • build: bump Node to 24.18 for June 2026 security releases by @amckinley in #11069
  • Clean up media-upload temp files on iOS by @so-asano in #11007
  • fix: restore Android native stretchy overscroll on image carousel by @Pintu-Jha in #11072
  • Add missing l18n wrapper to ‘⚠Invalid Handle’ in handles.ts by @smileyhead in #11071
  • Upgrade pnpm to 11.10.0 by @ds-boyce in #11075
  • fix camera roll gif selection hanging on ios by @vineyardbovines in #11074
  • Bump dcarbone/install-jq-action from 3.2.0 to 4.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in #11077
  • Bump actions/cache from 5.0.5 to 6.1.0 by @dependabot[bot] in #11078
  • Bump the actions group with 5 updates by @dependabot[bot] in #11076
  • Fix zizmor findings in build workflows by @mozzius in #11046
  • Automatically resolve hosting provider from handle by @mozzius in #11053
  • Clean up feature gate for follow buttons in expanded notifications by @abenzer in #11068
  • fix(search): Update advanced search label text (#11049) by @Pintu-Jha in #11064
  • Bump golang.org/x/net from 0.47.0 to 0.55.0 in /bskyweb by @dependabot[bot] in #11055
  • Force native builds when package.json version changes in OTA deploy by @mozzius in #11061
  • Use 'hyphens' instead of 'dashes' in error string by @surfdude29 in #11050
  • fix web video preview error aborting upload by @vineyardbovines in #11079
  • Use Sift for username suggestions during signup by @ds-boyce in #11051
  • Bump github.com/jackc/pgx/v5 from 5.5.0 to 5.9.2 in /bskyweb by @dependabot[bot] in #10463
  • Fix back swipe opening the drawer after a cold-start deep link by @mozzius in #11065
  • v1.127.0 release by @mozzius in #11087

New Contributors

  • @ashish-khankari made their first contribution in #10774
  • @LooneyH made their first contribution in #10636
  • @so-asano made their first contribution in #11007
  • @Pintu-Jha made their first contribution in #11072

Full Changelog: 1.126.0...1.127.0

entry.title: v1.126.0
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • Simplify Android build: bundletool + eas submit by @mozzius in #9855
  • Add nightly iOS/Android build workflow by @estrattonbailey in #10940
  • Bump version to 1.126.0 by @estrattonbailey in #10942
  • Fix nightly build workflow by @estrattonbailey in #10943
  • Restore ALT badges in quoted posts by @jcsalterego in #10964
  • Process videos on web with WebCodecs by @vineyardbovines in #10955
  • bskyweb: add isPartOf jsonld post attr by @blackmichael in #10945
  • Add TestFlight group selection to iOS build workflow by @vineyardbovines in #10979
  • Add mark all as read to chat settings by @ds-boyce in #10973
  • Fix embeds overlapping each other in chat by @ds-boyce in #10949
  • Remove old message composer by @ds-boyce in #10951
  • Add light haptics to Edit Profile Button for labellers by @RetroSunstar in #10948
  • Fix setState-in-render warning from convo cache subscription by @mozzius in #10934
  • Fix internal repo sync broken by actions/checkout v6 bump by @mozzius in #10933
  • Tweak strings and context by @surfdude29 in #10928
  • Set a min height on native Menus by @ds-boyce in #10956
  • signup: align "Contact support" to the right on larger displays by @iLynxcat in #10978
  • [APP-2429] Add Sunlight and Twilight color options to the Invite Friends QR code by @vineyardbovines in #10921
  • Fix issue with stale unread message counts by @ds-boyce in #10953
  • Focus composer input when editable by @ds-boyce in #10982
  • Upgrade pnpm to 11.9.0 by @ds-boyce in #10952
  • Add new chat notification preferences by @ds-boyce in #10972
  • Display more information in chat replies by @ds-boyce in #10950
  • Video alt text by @estrattonbailey in #10990
  • Show shorter text for account label badge by @abenzer in #10983
  • Add icon to AppLanguageDropdown by @iLynxcat in #10977
  • Increase unread cap to 99+ by @ds-boyce in #10985
  • Hide autocomplete suggestions when input loses focus by @ds-boyce in #10989
  • Add video upload telemetry events by @vineyardbovines in #10991
  • Add placeholder, empty-value, and onConfirm support to DateField by @estrattonbailey in #10993
  • Change dialog label and header from 'Invite Friends' to 'Share Profile' by @gabecodez in #10987
  • Bump actions/download-artifact from 7.0.0 to 8.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in #10971
  • Clean up type/lint errors in modules by @mozzius in #10996
  • Add app language: Czech (cs) by @surfdude29 in #10994
  • Fail video duration check before compression by @vineyardbovines in #10999
  • Add advanced search UI by @ds-boyce in #10992
  • Fix GrowthBook exposure did mis-attribution across account switches by @estrattonbailey in #11000
  • Fix 149/150 user limit for starter packs by @RetroSunstar in #11001
  • Set apple team id via environment variable by @mozzius in #11008
  • Fix CI - grant workflows permission for internal sync push by @mozzius in #11010
  • Disable selectable profile description on Android by @mozzius in #11002
  • Fix chat input positioning on mobile android by @mozzius in #11013
  • Release Prep 1.126.0 by @estrattonbailey in #11015

New Contributors

  • @iLynxcat made their first contribution in #10978
  • @gabecodez made their first contribution in #10987

Full Changelog: 1.125.0...1.126.0

entry.title: v1.125.0
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • Add a Metrics Server to bskyweb by @jcalabro in #10863
  • Change Users I follow to People I follow by @ds-boyce in #10860
  • Redirect to messages after leaving a chat by @ds-boyce in #10861
  • Run codemod for replacing BskyAgent with AtpAgent by @ds-boyce in #10862
  • [bskyembed] Add gallery embed support by @vineyardbovines in #10818
  • Fix overlapping touch targets for profile header buttons by @vineyardbovines in #10868
  • [Chat] Update single-convo cache on firehose mute/unmute events by @mozzius in #10865
  • [Chat] Update bskyogcard lexicon version by @mozzius in #10871
  • Fix Rescind request button by @ds-boyce in #10869
  • Optimistically update chat invite button status by @ds-boyce in #10870
  • Fix followed by chat invites by @ds-boyce in #10873
  • Bump font size for disabled invite link dialog text by @ds-boyce in #10874
  • Fix cursor position when editing a group chat name by @ds-boyce in #10872
  • [Chat] Use relatedprofiles for reactions/new message logs by @mozzius in #10875
  • Bump version to v1.125.0 by @mozzius in #10876
  • Make StandardSiteEmbed peekable by @mozzius in #10866
  • Keep lightbox image index on device rotation by @vineyardbovines in #10867
  • Replace broken @claude workflow with Bedrock-based claude-review/mention by @amckinley in #10880
  • Upgrade to pnpm 11.5.3 by @ds-boyce in #10879
  • Fixes follow buttons inside notification bundles not changing state on follow by @abenzer in #10882
  • [Chat] Hide blocked accounts' reactions in chats by @mozzius in #10889
  • [Chat] Change chat invite border color to low by @mozzius in #10886
  • Fix invite card avatar pile not reflecting member count by @mozzius in #10891
  • [Chat] Fix block dialog overflow issues by @mozzius in #10887
  • [Chat] Restructure MessageItem to prevent alignment issues by @mozzius in #10888
  • Fix chat firehose event handling and error recovery by @mozzius in #10884
  • Fix pluralization for group chat member counts by @ds-boyce in #10896
  • Update OTA docs by @ds-boyce in #10895
  • Add long-press menu to Chat tab for marking all as read by @mozzius in #10890
  • Fix scroll edge effects on iOS 27 by @mozzius in #10907
  • [Chat] fix: enforce convo-present invariant for active convo states by @mozzius in #10906
  • [Chat] Fix member count in SearchablePeopleList by @mozzius in #10909
  • fix: truncate long display names in group chat member picker (#10899) by @wingerter in #10901
  • Use pnpm 11.7.0 by @mozzius in #10900
  • [Chat] Hide unread state for selected chat list item by @mozzius in #10910
  • Fix over-eager URL faceting in DMs composer by @estrattonbailey in #10877
  • Bump vite from 8.0.12 to 8.0.16 in /bskyembed by @dependabot[bot] in #10912
  • Reset textarea height after clear by @ds-boyce in #10911
  • Message replies in chat by @mozzius in #10903
  • Replace Add User to Lists Modal with modern Dialog by @mozzius in #9677
  • Swipe to reply in chat by @mozzius in #10920
  • Fix DM embeds being dropped when sending by @mozzius in #10924
  • Run eslint --fix by @mozzius in #10923
  • Delete gallery fallback by @mozzius in #10922
  • Pin every action to latest SHA by @mozzius in #10779
  • Ensure text composed via IME is visible by @estrattonbailey in #10925
  • Fix quote causing chat message to overflow on web by @mozzius in #10926
  • Get unread counts vs counting convos by @ds-boyce in #10878
  • Fix for AutosizedTextarea not resetting height after clear on Android by @estrattonbailey in #10927
  • Persist selected QR code color theme in invite friends dialog by @vineyardbovines in #10892
  • Increase chat bubble max width to 85% (was 80%) by @ds-boyce in #10930
  • Rip out Modal system completely by @mozzius in #9903
  • Replace setup-cocoapods action with inline version assert by @mozzius in #10932
  • Flash message bubble when tapping a reply by @ds-boyce in #10929
  • Style follow buttons in expanded bundles, add client event on expand by @abenzer in #10915
  • v1.125 release prep by @mozzius in #10936

New Contributors

  • @wingerter made their first contribution in #10901

Full Changelog: 1.124.0...1.125.0

entry.title: v1.124.0
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • Add plural formatting to "Group name is too long" strings by @surfdude29 in #10769
  • [Chat] Fix overflowing chat names by @mozzius in #10780
  • Fix alignment of error screen by @ds-boyce in #10763
  • Use new listConvoRequests endpoint by @ds-boyce in #10755
  • Add Leave chat button to settings for chat owners by @ds-boyce in #10764
  • Show accept/reject footer for empty request convos by @mozzius in #10781
  • [Chat] Invite link dialog tweaks by @mozzius in #10750
  • Block posting of invalid chat invites by @ds-boyce in #10757
  • [Chat] Fix footer logic by @mozzius in #10785
  • [Chat] Rename invite route to /chat/ by @mozzius in #10782
  • Refactor photo embed analytics to post:photoEmbed:* namespace by @vineyardbovines in #10784
  • [Chat] Centralize conversation report-subject resolution by @mozzius in #10754
  • Add fade-in animation to chat footer/composer by @ds-boyce in #10786
  • Open edit chat name dialog via tap by @ds-boyce in #10790
  • Remove TODO for uninviting group chat members by @ds-boyce in #10789
  • Only show Message option if chat member can be messaged by @ds-boyce in #10788
  • Remove social proof from group invites by @mozzius in #10787
  • [Chat] Try and resolve loading bug once and for all by @mozzius in #10791
  • Refactor age assurance flags and contexts by @estrattonbailey in #10794
  • Upgrade to pnpm 11.5.2 by @ds-boyce in #10793
  • Hide last message in chat list if it's blocked by @ds-boyce in #10800
  • Mark string for translation and add context by @surfdude29 in #10805
  • [Chat] Gate group chats for under-18 users by @mozzius in #10548
  • Fix fullscreen infinite render loop in video embeds by @mozzius in #10807
  • Fix composer horizontal swipe triggering browser back/forward by @vineyardbovines in #10812
  • Catch NotAllowedError in web GIF player + lint modules/ by @mozzius in #10806
  • Update handling of join link previews by @ds-boyce in #10798
  • version number by @vineyardbovines in #10815
  • [Chat] Filter out groups from badge counts when AA'd by @mozzius in #10816
  • bskyweb: extract gallery media for SEO by @blackmichael in #10813
  • Fix text truncating in image menu on iOS by @ds-boyce in #10802
  • Display toast after reacting emoji reaction limit by @ds-boyce in #10799
  • [Chat] Surface blocked members to top of group member list for owner by @mozzius in #10726
  • Fix back button behavior on conversation settings screen by @ds-boyce in #10801
  • Don't suggest users who can't be messaged/added by @ds-boyce in #10820
  • [Chat] Show invite link label in chat list preview by @mozzius in #10811
  • Fix link to profile from chat invite embed by @ds-boyce in #10822
  • Address chat design nits by @ds-boyce in #10823
  • Add list of mutual chats to block dialog by @ds-boyce in #10727
  • [Chat] add lil gap between chats on web by @mozzius in #10821
  • Change Ignore to Reject for chat invites by @ds-boyce in #10825
  • Fix image collapse in FF by @estrattonbailey in #10826
  • Hide domain if matches handle, new Standard Site icon treatment by @estrattonbailey in #10767
  • bskyweb: meta noindex tag for non-indexable pages by @blackmichael in #10803
  • Support dim theme on join request landing page by @ds-boyce in #10832
  • Clear search term after adding chat member by @ds-boyce in #10831
  • [Chat] revalidate join links on leave by @mozzius in #10833
  • use opus 4.8 in github claude by @mozzius in #10837
  • Remove leave-convo suppression, use real optimistic update by @mozzius in #10834
  • [Chat] Fix optimistic updates by using partial keys by @mozzius in #10838
  • [Chat] Some tweaks by @mozzius in #10840
  • [Chat] Sync convo agent with shadow cache by @estrattonbailey in #10827
  • [Chat] Fix source of truth for group size limit by @mozzius in #10845
  • Tweak spacing in invite link dialog by @ds-boyce in #10829
  • Put display name and handle on one line in invite dialog by @ds-boyce in #10824
  • Fix video preview collapse by @estrattonbailey in #10847
  • [Chat] Delete GroupChatGate by @mozzius in #10846
  • [Chat] Fix duplicate messages when history fetch races firehose by @mozzius in #10839
  • Enable Google Translate in post overflow menu by @ds-boyce in #10849
  • New layout for expanded notification bundles by @abenzer in #10664
  • Restore on-device translation from overflow menu by @ds-boyce in #10850
  • Invert group chat feature gate by @ds-boyce in #10851
  • Add profile QR code for sharing and inviting friends by @vineyardbovines in #10659
  • Add indication of total number of images in ComposerReplyTo by @mozzius in #10836
  • bskyweb: add video objects to jsonld SEO by @blackmichael in #10814
  • [Chat] Reusable loading/unavailable states for chat invites by @mozzius in #10819
  • [Chat] Handle moderation lock override in group chats by @mozzius in #10835
  • Add image to invite link NUX by @ds-boyce in #10852
  • Peek preview for external link embeds by @mozzius in #10704
  • [Chat] NUX by @mozzius in #10848
  • [Chat] Power conversation settings screen via useConvoQuery by @mozzius in #10853
  • Use add-only photo permission when saving QR codes by @vineyardbovines in #10854
  • Fix stale push notification replay after account switch by @vineyardbovines in #10792
  • Add new analytics events for group chats by @ds-boyce in #10830
  • Let text wrap in invite dialog by @estrattonbailey in #10855
  • Log when a chat invite is posted or messaged by @ds-boyce in #10858
  • Release Prep 1.124.0 by @estrattonbailey in #10859

Full Changelog: 1.123.0...1.124.0

entry.title: v1.123.0
entry.content:
What's Changed

  • [Chat] Add OpenGraph card for chat invite links by @mozzius in #10629
  • Refactor and improve seo schema.org data by @blackmichael in #10613
  • Update presentation of DM header by @ds-boyce in #10619
  • Moar Standard Site Tweaks by @estrattonbailey in #10641
  • Disable other chat settings when a chat is locked by @ds-boyce in #10623
  • Colocate all chat log event handlers by @ds-boyce in #10632
  • Prevent silent Denis failures in the future by @estrattonbailey in #10645
  • Fix spacing when no description in SS pub card by @estrattonbailey in #10648
  • Bump version to v1.123.0 by @mozzius in #10647
  • Bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.40.0 to 0.45.0 in /bskyweb by @dependabot[bot] in #10640
  • Use pnpm to handle node/pnpm versions in Dockerfile by @mozzius in #10642
  • [Chat] Add other chat route handlers to bskyweb by @mozzius in #10639
  • Fix layout of NotFound screen and convert to ALF by @ds-boyce in #10649
  • Refactor notification settings as dialogs by @ds-boyce in #10646
  • Fix email verification dialog by @mozzius in #10657
  • [Chat] Add chat disabled banner by @mozzius in #10573
  • Switch sonner-native patch to target ESM source by @mozzius in #10668
  • Gate new group chat creation on canCreateGroups by @mozzius in #10656
  • [pnpm] Use latest pnpm by @mozzius in #10585
  • fix(ios): fix Hermes startup race in ExpoBridgeModule (patch) by @mozzius in #10672
  • [Chat] Add /c/:code handler to bskyweb by @mozzius in #10630
  • Show chat info panel for empty chats by @ds-boyce in #10677
  • Display join requests on chat list by @ds-boyce in #10679
  • Fix Android crash in chat keyboard scroll by @mozzius in #10673
  • Fix duplicate haptic feedback when liking posts by @cilvet in #10678
  • Update Intl polyfills by @mozzius in #10587
  • Update date-fns to latest by @mozzius in #10545
  • Update mod SDK by @estrattonbailey in #10682
  • Remove unused slider dep by @mozzius in #10618
  • [Chat] Tweak styles in invite link dialog by @mozzius in #10638
  • Message sent time is not updated immediately in ChatList screen by @rawatnaresh in #7768
  • Ungate video upload size change by @mozzius in #10683
  • Fix scrollbar behaviour in splitview by @mozzius in #10685
  • Use expo/expo-github-action v9 by @ds-boyce in #10689
  • Run GitHub actions in parallel by @ds-boyce in #10509
  • [ALG-96] Don't fall back to search for onboarding user suggestions by @estrattonbailey in #10680
  • Remove image upload flags by @estrattonbailey in #10687
  • ci: add dependabot config with 7-day cooldown by @amckinley in #10475
  • Bump slackapi/slack-github-action from 2.1.1 to 3.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in #10693
  • Bump marocchino/sticky-pull-request-comment from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in #10692
  • Bump actions/create-github-app-token from 1 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in #10691
  • Create logged-out view for group chat invites by @ds-boyce in #10598
  • Prefer opengraph image, fall back to Standard Site coverImage by @estrattonbailey in #10694
  • Don't show Suggested heading if there are no suggestions by @ds-boyce in #10695
  • Create screen for managing chat requests by @ds-boyce in #10635
  • fix blur on image alt text background by @vineyardbovines in #10658
  • Revert "[ALG-96] Don't fall back to search for onboarding user suggestions (#10680)" by @estrattonbailey in #10699
  • Add iOS peek long-press context menu for image embeds by @mozzius in #10300
  • Transpile @atproto/api package for older browser support by @ds-boyce in #10700
  • [ALF] Set text to leading_snug by default by @mozzius in #10627
  • Use square icons for labellers in Automation Label preview card by @RetroSunstar in #10701
  • Mention default <Text> style in CLAUDE.md by @mozzius in #10705
  • Fix alt text selection in lightbox on Android (and iOS) by @vineyardbovines in #10698
  • Mount message dialogs once at the list level by @ds-boyce in #10435
  • Hide accept button for locked chats by @ds-boyce in #10696
  • Enable ESLint errors and suppress existing violations by @ds-boyce in #10490
  • [Android] Fix horizontal swipes being cancelled when leaving bounds by @mozzius in #10712
  • Compile i18n before running lint by @ds-boyce in #10711
  • Fix image peek in carousels for quote posts by @vineyardbovines in #10688
  • Make extra sure the drawer gesture doesn't accidentally trigger on Android by @mozzius in #10713
  • expo-image tweaks by @mozzius in #10710
  • Fix invalid zero plural category and add plural formatting by @surfdude29 in #10722
  • Use correct Plural macro in InviteLinkDialog by @surfdude29 in #10723
  • Fix labeller highlight when selected on bottom bar by @heikadog in #10716
  • Disable overscroll on Android to fix settle discrepancy by @estrattonbailey in #10717
  • Add group chat join links to supported embed types by @ds-boyce in #10454
  • Switch dynamic app icon library to @bsky.app, fix build flakiness by @mozzius in #10724
  • Apply per-use-case image size configs by @estrattonbailey in #10690
  • Fix web carousel horizontal swipe triggering browser back/forward by @vineyardbovines in #10718
  • ensure alt text is scrollable by @vineyardbovines in #10671
  • Show image count badge on in-feed carousel by @vineyardbovines in #10719
  • Improve error message for group chat join link by @ds-boyce in #10729
  • Fix useJoinRequestMutation by @ds-boyce in #10730
  • [Chat] Add chat invite as message embed type by @mozzius in #10728
  • V smol log cleanups by @estrattonbailey in #10731
  • Reduce stale time for join link preview queries by @ds-boyce in #10733
  • Show a banner when there are incoming chat requests by @ds-boyce in #10498
  • Add gallery embed type support (display + compose) by @vineyardbovines in #10707
  • Use Reanimated layout animations for Android composer by @mozzius in #8546
  • Gate StandardSite subscribe button custom theme on AAA contrast by @estrattonbailey in #10735
  • Add OTA fallback for gallery embed by @vineyardbovines in #10734
  • [Chat] Request screen tweaks by @mozzius in #10747
  • [Chat] Fix stale reactions dialog after removing a reaction by @mozzius in #10743
  • [Chat] Fix navigation stacking on messages links in split view by @mozzius in #10741
  • [Chat] Sync single-convo cache on chat lock firehose events by @mozzius in #10746
  • Align group invite settings with eligibility logic by @mozzius in #10748
  • [Chat] Disable font scaling on fixed-height chat invite cards by @mozzius in #10744
  • Fire embed:standardSite:view from feed viewability, not embed mount by @estrattonbailey in #10736
  • Fix feed scroll reset on device rotation by @mozzius in #10737
  • [CI] Remove Wandalen/wretry.action, call pnpm install directly by @mozzius in #10745
  • "Follows You" string dedupe by @mozzius in #10751
  • [Chat] Put pointer_events_none on chat bubbles in ChatListItem by @mozzius in #10752
  • [Chat] Enforce limits for group size by @mozzius in #10753
  • Fix external card long press on web by @mozzius in #10739
  • Let specified facets take priority in feed descriptions by @mozzius in #10740
  • Remove useWindowDimensions from ProfileBadges by @mozzius in #10738
  • Improve error messages for LeaveConvoPrompt by @ds-boyce in #10760
  • Link to owner's profile from link embed by @ds-boyce in #10759
  • Fix Android crash when sharing unreadable media into the app by @mozzius in #10674
  • Android share intent: logging + temp file cleanup by @estrattonbailey in #10762
  • [Drafts] Always write embedGallery for image embeds by @estrattonbailey in #10761
  • Add plural formatting for error toast by @surfdude29 in #10756
  • Fix draft image pres with 4+ images by @estrattonbailey in #10765
  • Release 1.123.0 by @estrattonbailey in #10766

New Contributors

  • @blackmichael made their first contribution in #10613
  • @cilvet made their first contribution in #10678
  • @rawatnaresh made their first contribution in #7768

Full Changelog: 1.122.0...1.123.0
